title: athyrium zeylanicum
intro: Athyrium zeylanicum, also known as the Ceylon fern, is a type of flowering plant in the Athyrium genus. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium zeylanicum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Athyrium zeylanicum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is commonly used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
